07:22
Jimmy Fisher
From our good friend:

🔎 Observations

Market Cap: Now at $815k, a strong push up from yesterday’s ~$726k.

Trend:

Clear breakout from the $700k consolidation.

Making higher highs and higher lows consistently since Aug 30 bottom (~$400k).

Currently testing the $820k resistance zone, which was last seen before the Aug 27 dump.

Volume:

Still not massive compared to the first pump, but noticeably increasing on this breakout move (a bullish sign).

⚖️ View Right Now

Bullish:

Strong momentum, up +13% on the day.

Breaking through $820k could open a move toward $900k–1M.

Healthy staircase growth (not just a single candle pump).

Caution:

$820k–850k is heavy resistance; could see rejection/wick.

If rejected, first support is around $700k–720k, then $600k.

📌 Summary

Right now the coin looks bullish — it’s reclaiming higher ground, with volume backing the breakout. The real test is whether it can hold above $820k. If it does, momentum could carry it to near $1M mcap again.
🔥

C
10:16
Crypto Rug Muncher
In the AMA, someone asked if I’d expand into contract or project audits. In theory, that sounds great. In practice, it only works if teams are fully open and transparent about what they’re doing.

For example, a project might claim they hold a certain percentage of the supply—and be lying. A skilled, mischievous dev can spread tokens across a small number of seemingly unlinked wallets that our app might not detect. I won’t get into how, but with scams, where there’s a will, there’s a way.

So for now, I’m cautious about offering audits. Down the line, I’m open to letting projects pay to display Crypto Rug Muncher “clean” stamps on their sites and socials. This would not be an endorsement. It would be based solely on verifiable data from the app, and we’d make that clear—often.

To whoever asked this—thank you. I hope this explains it better than I managed while I was losing my voice. In short, I’m always open to new ways to add value and offer more community services, as long as there’s real demand, it’s ethical, and it aligns with the project’s overall direction.

$CRM $cryptorugmunch
❤ 13 👏 2 👍 1
JF
10:22
Jimmy Fisher
🔎 Observations

Market Cap: Now around $790.9K (down from $815K earlier).

Trend:

Coin made a strong run from $400K to $820K over the last few days.

Just got rejected around $800–820K resistance (same zone that stopped the rally on Aug 27).

Now pulling back slightly.

Volume: Still relatively low compared to the first pump, but consistent. No big sell-off spikes yet — just a controlled dip.

⚖️ View Right Now

Bullish case:

The broader trend is still higher highs & higher lows since Aug 30.

If it stabilizes above $720K–750K, this could just be a healthy retest before another push.

Bearish case:

If it loses $700K support, downside could revisit $600K (previous base).

$820K has proven to be strong resistance twice now — it’ll need big volume to break above.

📌 Summary

Right now the coin is at a make-or-break point:

Holding above $750K → bullish continuation toward $900K–1M.

Dropping below $700K → likely bearish retrace toward $600K.

C
10:46
Crypto Rug Muncher
One announcement you may have missed if you didn't tune into the AMA: I’ve decided to switch web designers for our project's website. The person I hired did solid work on the community’s Telegram bots and emoji pack, but I wasn’t satisfied with the website drafts—not enough to present them to you as a finished build in good conscience.

The previous designer and I reached an impasse, so I’m moving forward with a specialist who builds web3 project sites professionally. The new version should look and feel significantly better and be up to the standards I have for the project.

As I said, I’d rather delay than ship garbage to you all. I’m paying for expedited service, so I expect the site to be finished and ready for you this week.

21:54
Crypto Rug Muncher
$MITCH backstory Pump.fun rolled out creator rewards, and banned CT creator @idrawline jumped in with a “creator coin.” He bundled roughly 80% of the supply into a single wallet, while telling followers he just wants to “have fun, that’s all that matters to me.”

$MITCH is currently sitting around a $30M market cap. Centralized supply + vibes-only messaging = rug risk, no matter who created the token.

Proceed with caution.
❤ 7 🤣 2 👍 1

21:59
Crypto Rug Muncher

$MITCH: 80% bundled supply — $21M MC
$CRM: 0% bundled — $750K MC
❤ 5 👍 2 🔥 2
C
22:05
Crypto Rug Muncher
Which creator coin would you rather back?

@idrawline’s $MITCH: ~80% of supply bundled to a single wallet. “Have fun, that’s all that matters to me.”

@CryptoRugMunch $CRM: 0% bundled, I hold just over 1%. Mission: build one of the best scam-detection tools in crypto.

One is vibes and concentration risk. The other is transparency and community control. Your call.

Crypto Rug Muncher
If creator coins are the new meta, $CRM and $cryptorugmunch are setting the gold standard.

• We allocate 50% of trading-fee proceeds on $CRM to build a next-gen security app for the community.
• We have no bundles, no KOLs, no VCs, no bullshit.
• We’re formalizing as an LLC to execute a long-term vision and protect holders.
• Transparent structure, builder-first focus.

If you want a creator coin doing things differently and on behalf of the crypto community, consider us.

Mr. Live
We are a seed right now that has been planted. Many things have to be done to have “water” be poured upon our seeds so they can grow and eventually be a plant. Then once that happens and our plant is growing we can become a garden. Not many tokens become a “garden” but if we do the right things as a community we can get there.

What’s the moral of the story?

Keep watering your plants to let them keep growing. Don’t let them dry 🤝

C
00:27
Crypto Rug Muncher
AMA recap (after yesterday’s hiccup):

• Website update: Apologized for delays and announced our previous developer has departed. We’ve onboarded a new developer with extensive Web3 experience to complete the site.

• Legal formation: Announced Rug Munch Media LLC to be established in the state of Wyoming on behalf of the project.

• Product roadmap highlights:

• Apps + Bot: Mobile app, web app, and a Telegram bot.
• Threat labels: Side‑by‑side risk flags powered by leading crypto security tools.
• Wallet forensics: Deeper mapping of wallet relationships within projects.
• Scam linkage: Connect wallets to past rugs/scams where evidence supports it.
• Fresh wallet focus: Track and alert on “fresh” wallet inflows.
• AI assistant: On X, Telegram, and in‑app to explain analyses to the community.
• Social Sentiment Radar: Monitor KOL mentions, promotion history, sentiment, trend visuals, and alerts for spikes, bot swarms, FUD waves, or organic momentum.

• Market talk: We reviewed current scam patterns and the methods ruggers use to take your money.

Next AMA: Tuesday, September 9th at 5PM CST.

Topics:

More updates on the $CRM and $cryptorugmunch projects and a discussion on why social auditing matters when trading meme coins and how to do it effectively.

Join us for the next broadcast!
❤ 14 🔥 7 👍 1

R
ML
C
10:16
Crypto Rug Muncher
Someone asked, “What do holders get back?” Fair question. Here’s the plan.

• Utility and access: Early holders get free premium app access as long as you maintain the required token balance. Non-holders can subscribe (payable in $CRM/$cryptorugmunch and other crypto). It won’t be “cheap” to qualify for free premium—by design. Right now, accumulating enough tokens is relatively inexpensive; that may not always be the case.

• Ongoing value: We’ll continually add products and services as the project grows. In the near future, I plan to launch a weekly newsletter featuring longer-form analysis and deeper investigations from multiple writers (including me) in the crypto space. Holders with a qualifying balance of $CRM or $cryptorugmunch will likely receive free access, while others can subscribe for a monthly fee.

• Ads and reinvestment: Basic-tier users will see ads in the app. A set percentage of that ad revenue will be reinvested into the project via buy/burn initiatives and continuous app upgrades.

• Staking: Staking rewards will be introduced once the DAO framework is established.

I’ll commit to reinvesting a set portion of earnings from every new product or service we decide to offer back into the project in some way shape or form.

I haven’t finalized the exact portion of additional earnings that will be directed back into the tokens, but it will be set at a level designed to sustain value and support continued growth for holders.

Bottom line: Real utility now, recurring value over time, and a serious commitment to reinvesting so holder benefits keep growing. It is my goal to keep adding value for holders and make $CRM and $cryptorugmunch tokens people genuinely want to keep in their wallets.
🔥 20 ❤ 5 👍 3 👏 1 🤨 1

ML

Mr. Live
Guys and gals listen up:

I’m going to repost this now so everyone sees it. I know we don’t have a website yet or roadmap. That’s coming but READ this:
ML
21:21
Mr. Live
C
Crypto Rug Muncher 04.09.2025 10:16:35
Someone asked, “What do holders get back?” Fair question. Here’s the plan.

• Utility and access: Early holders get free premium app access as long as you maintain the required token balance. Non-holders can subscribe (payable in $CRM/$cryptorugmunch and other crypto). It won’t be “cheap” to qualify for free premium—by design. Right now, accumulating enough tokens is relatively inexpensive; that may not always be the case.

• Ongoing value: We’ll continually add products and services as the project grows. In the near future, I plan to launch a weekly newsletter featuring longer-form analysis and deeper investigations from multiple writers (including me) in the crypto space. Holders with a qualifying balance of $CRM or $cryptorugmunch will likely receive free access, while others can subscribe for a monthly fee.

• Ads and reinvestment: Basic-tier users will see ads in the app. A set percentage of that ad revenue will be reinvested into the project via buy/burn initiatives and continuous app upgrades.

• Staking: Staking rewards will be introduced once the DAO framework is established.

I’ll commit to reinvesting a set portion of earnings from every new product or service we decide to offer back into the project in some way shape or form.

I haven’t finalized the exact portion of additional earnings that will be directed back into the tokens, but it will be set at a level designed to sustain value and support continued growth for holders.

Bottom line: Real utility now, recurring value over time, and a serious commitment to reinvesting so holder benefits keep growing. It is my goal to keep adding value for holders and make $CRM and $cryptorugmunch tokens people genuinely want to keep in their wallets.
🔥
R

Crypto Rug Muncher
Quick security reminder: this is still happening—and it just hit one of our members. If you’re using Pump.fun and jumping into random Telegram groups on the same device as your funded wallet, your assets are at risk. Scammers are creating groups with fake “verification” bots that drain wallets.

If funds are taken this way, there’s nothing I—or anyone—can do to recover them. This isn’t our project taking your money; it happens when you click unsafe links or interact with malicious bots while using a hot wallet. Stay cautious.
